name: Passover Bagel
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and oil in a bowl.
2. Mix in matzo meal, sugar, and salt until well combined.
3. Beat the eggs separately.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the dough and mix well to combine.
5. Let the mixture stand until it begins to cool slightly.
6. Shape the dough into round balls in your hands.
7. Make a small indentation in the center of each ball with your thumb.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Place the bagels on a greased baking sheet.
10. Bake for about 20-25 minutes, or until lightly browned and firm to the touch.
